description.value:
Baseline (0 Spirituality): As an action, focus on one creature, text, map, contract, sigil, or mechanical object within 30 feet for up to 1 minute (concentration). Make a Spirituality (Investigation) check contested by the target's passive Deception (creature) or against DC 12 (object/text; GM may raise DC for complex ciphers or master forgeries). On a success, choose one insight: (a) one hidden inconsistency or forged element, (b) the target's immediate intent and pressure point, or (c) the most vulnerable procedural step tied to that target. You gain +1d4 to the next check this scene that directly uses that insight.

Higher Spend (upcast):

  • +1 Spirituality: Range becomes 60 feet, and you may extract two insights instead of one.
  • +2 Spirituality: You may analyze up to two targets; if one is a text or diagram, decode a basic ciphered instruction (not sealed mystical encryption).
  • +4 Spirituality: Mark one analyzed target for 10 minutes. Once before the mark ends, reroll a failed Investigation, Insight, or Arcana check against that target.

Counterplay: Deliberate misinformation, layered false trails, and anti-divination masking can impose disadvantage or higher DCs.

Corruption Hook: If you use this insight to deliberately violate an agreement you formally accepted, gain 1 Corruption.

Legacy Upgrade (Sequence 8 - Scope)

At Sequence 8, Close Reading can compare linked references in one pass. When you cast Close Reading with at least +1 Spirituality, choose one secondary target (creature, clause, diagram, or object) within 10 feet of the primary target and resolve a second analysis check. If both checks succeed, extract one comparative deduction (contradiction, forged linkage, or procedural mismatch) and grant the resulting +1d4 insight bonus to yourself or one ally within 30 feet. Once per short rest, you may apply this comparative rider without paying the +1 surcharge.

affects.special: creature, text, or object in sight

materials.value: a marked page or annotation tool
